mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_diagnosis_record (project_id, node_id, trigger_type, question, context_summary, diagnosis, severity, saved_to_kb, kb_document_id, operator_id, token_used, create_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{nodeId}, #{triggerType}, #{question}, #{contextSummary}, #{diagnosis}, #{severity}, #{savedToKb}, #{kbDocumentId}, #{operatorId}, #{tokenUsed}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_diagnosis_record SET kb_document_id = #{kbDocumentId}, saved_to_kb = #{savedToKb} WHERE id = #{id}
